initial_draft:
<proposal count> 2 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 45 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 60 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> RED accepted my offer of 55 ZUP. Since I have already secured the object within my budget, I will accept the trade.</reason>
<player answer> B) Accept the trade </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> Great! I accept the trade. Thanks RED! </message>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present and in the correct order, with valid content.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. I accepted the trade at 55 ZUP, which is well within my budget of 60 ZUP. There’s no room for improvement here as accepting the trade is the optimal move.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. The opponent already explicitly accepted the trade.
4. Consistency: OK. My reason accurately reflects my acceptance of the trade, and the message aligns with my move.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I haven't exceeded my proposal limit and am following all rules.
</critique>
